texto: I keep thinking and worry about life, he says...I asked him: can you change yesterday?he said: no..I asked him: do you know what will happen tomorrow?he said: no..If you do not know what will happen tomorrowand if you can not change yesterdaythat means you only have today.Start living Life while you have it.Today.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Faruk H.T. que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “I keep thinking and worry about life, he says...I asked him: can you change yesterday?he said: no…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, life-and-living, asked, com foco em mudanca e reflexao.

texto: Are you a Christian? she said.I answered:I am a Christian, I am a Jew, I am a Catholic, I am Muslim. I am each and everyone of you my child, look into the mirror and you will see me,as i see you..
